dealSummary: Standard Intelligence, an artificial general intelligence lab, secured a $75 million round led by Sequoia and Spark Capital.
Precision therapeutics startup KymaThera is in talks to raise a $75 million round, Axios reported.
Payments infrastructure company Fun received a $72 million Series A led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire.
Disa Technologies, which develops a platform for mineral processing, raised a $33 million round led by Galvanize.
Digital pathology platform developer Techcyte secured a $15 million round led by Van Tuyl Companies.
